title: Brooks Women's Ghost 14 Neutral Running Shoe
features: Imported
Rubber sole

THIS WOMEN'S SHOE IS FOR: Runners looking for a smooth ride that won’t distract from the fun of the run. The Ghost 14 offers a simplified midsole construction which creates more seamless transitions. This Brooks Ghost 14 is a certified PDAC A5500 Diabetic shoe and has been granted the APMA Seal of Acceptance.

SUPPORT AND CUSHION: The Ghost 14 offers neutral support while providing high energizing cushioning. Ideal for road running, cross training, the gym or wherever you might want to take them! Predecessor: Ghost 13

BALANCED, SOFT CUSHIONING: BioMoGo DNA and DNA LOFT cushioning work together to provide a just-right softness underfoot without losing responsiveness and durability - yet it feels lighter than ever. DNA LOFT now makes up the entire midsole, for a softer, smoother, ride.
SMOOTH, STABLE RIDE: No matter how your foot lands, our Segmented Crash Pad - an integrated system of shock absorbers - will cushion every step and stride for smooth heel-to-toe transitions.
SOFT, SECURE, FIT: More strategic use of the 3D Fit Print upper technology provides structure that moves with the foot.

reviews.title: Beware of imposters
reviews.text:
My original Brooks ripped in the seam so I ordered a new pair in Amazon. When they came they did not fit like my old ones at all.
I ended up contacting BrooksRunning directly and received the pair from them. TOTALLY PERFECT!!
What a difference from the ones purchased in Amazon. Even the labeling is different. Brooks is one of the most comfortable sneakers I have ever owned. I have four pairs. I did not have any luck through Amazon.

reviews.title: So comfortable!
reviews.text: Comfortable, good support, walked over 9 miles without blisters.  The laces were too short, but over all I highly recommend.

reviews.title: The perfect shoe for me.
reviews.text:
This is the third iteration of Brooks' Ghost running shoe that I've purchased. I have 8, 9, and now 14. These are the most comfortable shoes I own. They're supportive, have enough room in the toe box, and cushioning in the soles.
I'm glad they come in solid colors as well as multicolored. I plan to buy another pair of Ghost 14 in the solid grey option.

reviews.title: Comfy must-buy
reviews.text: These are comfortable right out of the box. They have good supportive insoles and are very cushioned while being surprisingly lightweight. I bought them for a trip to Disneyland so they will get quite a product test in and I'll update when I know more.

reviews.title: Comfort and quality
reviews.text: Brooks makes the best running shoe! So comfortable and attractive. They last forever, too!

reviews.title: Knock offs!! Just DON'T DO IT ✅
reviews.text: [[VIDEOID:e270e5dd29b72c4c1bdeae3b2a3671e1]] They are dirty with red clay mud. Very very poorly made. For $185 I expect more quality. The material is not properly laid. I am a Nike Shox NZ fanatic. I have over 10 pair and clearly  these are knock offs. The Nike swish is smaller then my pinky finger nail. The shocks are not even so the shoe tilts. I will stick to buying in the store that way I know exactly what I am getting. Ohh let me add they charge you to return items. You have to drive to UPS to drop them off and they charge you a fee. I can not make this up the attached pictures do not lie. Do not buy from this seller. Don't do it!!!! Very disappointed 😞 RETURNING!!!!!

title: Wapiti Designs Go-Long Gaiters Trail Running Shoe Gaiters for Running, Hiking, or Long Distance Backpacking
features: Machine Wash
Ultralight trail gaiters to keep dirt and debris out of your shoe
Double walled ankle design allows for more durability around areas your feet may cause wear
S/M fits US Women's 7-11, US Men's 6-9; L/XL fits US Women's 11.5-13, US Men's 9.5-13
Perfect for Trail Running, Hiking, or Backpacking the PCT, CDT, AT

reviews.title: Great value
reviews.text:
Purchased these gaiters for our hike through the Grand Canyon. Didn't install the velcro strap and it still worked wonders. My wife had the Outdoor Research version with a sole strap and was more frustrated due to that strap unlatching constantly....and this is half the price. I cant speak against its durability with abbrasions or water resistance. It feels as though it would be very helpful if caught in a rainstorm.

I should add I wore the L size over Salomon 4d Quest (size 11) with a lot of room to spare.

reviews.title: Secure but difficult to remove
reviews.text: Decent gaiters. Front lace hook is 'upside down'; you have to slide it in UNDER the lace. Good design for being secure, but let me tell you, it is a pain in the rear to take them off.

reviews.title: Lived up and exceeded expectations
reviews.text: We weren’t expecting as much snow on the trail today kept my upper sock area more warm and dry then without. I was really surprised. Super comfortable.

reviews.title: Gaiters a Hikers Best Friend
reviews.text: I purchased these gaiters for my Bug out Bag Gear. I am very happy with these gaiters! they seem to have good quality, as far as construction, and seem to be well made. It's a Hikers Find. I would Recommend these, and they are a little cheaper than Dirty Girl Gaiters. I am considering another purchase in the future, as I feel having more than one pair to change out the dirty ones in between laundering is a smart move. The patterns are limited and also color choices, but it's functionality is whats more important! I haven't put them on trail or hiking as of yet, but I intend to in the future!

reviews.title: Gaiters keep sand out of shoes
reviews.text: I super glued the velcro to the heel of my shoes as directed, secured my new gaiters and went on a multi-day hike, frequently in sand. The gaiters did a marvelous job of keeping the sand and debris out of my shoes. Also, they are packed really small to stash in my backpack when not in use. I would recommend these gaiters.

reviews.title: Rubbed my Achilles raw

No padding or lining to protect your heels/Achilles and we worry socks. Perhaps ok if you are only going to be walking. However, we hike and hike mountains that are 7,000+ Ft. Great for earthing, building neuro pathways and feedback in feet.

reviews.title: Love these comfortable shoes
reviews.text: These shoes are as it is described for their comfort. It's like walking on a mattress and so much room. I ordered 8.5 wide width because I like a lot of room for my feet. I will most likely get another pair. Great for for heels with Achilles pain.

reviews.title: Good cushioning.
reviews.text: These have more support than my Asics running shoes. They fit my narrow feet quite well. I wear men's shoes due to long feet, so width can be a challenge. They're well made.

reviews.title: Great running shoes
reviews.text: Great looking shoe that fits well. Plenty of cushion and extremely light weight. I’ve been using Asics for over 5 years now and have never wanted to switch. These are comparable to both quality and performance. Overall very please. Will be using these for running as well as casual wear.

reviews.title: 5 stars
reviews.text: My son has the widest feet that I have ever seen in my life. These shoes are perfect for him. He said that they are very comfortable and they fit him true to size. He LOVES them!

reviews.title: Solid support!
reviews.text:
As these are made for speed, the weight should tell you these really are made of lightweight materials.
Are there lighter shoes out there?
Well, you're the runner, not me, but I suspect yes, probably.
I also suspect the lighter the shoe, the higher the price and the shorter the life, but what do I know......

reviews.title: Cut Foot
reviews.text: At first glance these shoes looked ideal. The uppers are mesh and they tie. The black and white look sporty. But the shoes left a,cut on the top of my left foot. The piece that holds the lace is not padded and it rubbed and cut the top of the foot. The right one was okay. Just not acceptable. I suppose yoi could afgix pads to prevent the rubbing or better yet buy shoes without that problem.

reviews.title: Great for walking and running, on even or paved surfaces.
reviews.text:
[[VIDEOID:c1b550fb45bc70f6146cd85777443b05]] The M MGRNDL sneakers are light, a bit flexible, and the air cushion design provides a cushioned impact. They have a good grip on surfaces, so they provide stability.

They do look good and the upper mesh fabric has some breathable properties.

They do a good job when walking and running short distances.
I would have liked if they mold to the foot better and had softer fabric, but at this price point it might be hard to find.

The M MGRNDL might not provide a good experience when running on uneven surfaces. They are not as comfortable as other well known and higher priced (twice as much) running sneakers brands.
The air cushion do provide a bit of support and comfort when running on even ground, such as concrete, pavement, grass or sand.
They do provide some level of impact resistant and support on the feet.

title: ASICS Women's GT-2000 4 Running Shoes
description:
The gt-2000 4 is the core runner’s bread and butter with its balance of cushioning and stability, outfitted by the comfortably supportive dynamic duomax and guidance trusstic system that also enhance gait efficiency. Our rear foot and forefoot gel cushioning systems are now even more adaptive, assisting mild to moderate over pronators alike with greater support, while the fluid ride midsole offers the ultimate ride.
In 1949, Mr. Kihachiro Onitsuka began his athletic footwear company (Onitsuka Co., Ltd.) by manufacturing basketball shoes out of his living room in Kobe, Japan. He chose the name ASICS for his company in 1977, based on a famous Latin phrase "Anima Sana In Corpore Sano," which, when translated, expresses the ancient ideal of "A Sound Mind in a Sound Body." Taking the acronym of this phrase, ASICS was founded on the belief that the best way to create a healthy and happy lifestyle is to promote total health and fitness. Today, ASICS offers a full line of performance-driven athletic shoes and technical active sports apparel and accessories dedicated to bringing harmony to the body and soul.
features: 100% Synthetic
Imported
Rubber sole
Impact Guidance System (I.G.S): ASICS design philosophy that employs linked componentry to enhance the foot's natural gait from heel strike to toe-off.
Dynamic duomax Support System: This evolution of duomax system enhances stability and support, with reduced weight and increased platform support.
Rear foot and Forefoot GEL Cushioning Systems: Attenuates shock during impact and toe-off phases, and allows movement in multiple planes as the foot transitions through the gait cycle.
Fluid ride: fluid ride provides the ultimate combination of bounce back and cushioning properties with reduced weight and exceptional durability.
Guidance Truss tic System: This Truss tic System integrates Guidance Line construction for enhanced gait efficiency while providing midfoot structural integrity.

reviews.title: Great shoe for an over-pronator like me
reviews.text: I've used the GT-2000 shoes over the last few years and have yet to have issue with them. I over-pronate pretty badly and this shoe offers great support for that issue; My knees thank me. I found the shoe to fit exactly true to size and for those reviews that say it's small, people tend to forget that your feet swell when you run, especially longer distances! My personal size foot is between a 6.5-7 and I typically wear a 7 shoe for running, dress, or sandals. I can't say I know the difference between the GT-2000 model numbers (1-5?) except for new-ness. I have no issue with wearing older models and like the cheaper prices. For reference, I run half marathons several times a year on city sidewalks, asphalt, dirt roads, and dirt trails.

reviews.title: This was a gift. Didn't fit. So, ...
reviews.text: This was a gift. Didn't fit. So, hearsay- I am not sure of the exact fit. They are exchanging for a bigger size though.

reviews.title: Great shoe but runs small
reviews.text: Great shoe, very supportive in the arch and heel. I love the bright colors of the Asics shoes. The only thing I would be leary of is the size of the shoe. It runs small. I wear an 8 and because of other reviews, bought a 8-1/2. They fit but are still a little snug. After wearing for a bit, they will loosen up enough to be great. If you have a wider foot, you may not like these particular shoes.

reviews.title: Color in photo is not quite accurate
reviews.text: Have always loved my Asics GT-2000.  32 marathons and our relationship continues!  My only comment about this particular color combo is the photo appears to be grey and more coral color.  When they arrived what looks like a coral color in the photo is closer to fluorescent orange!  They are a bit "loud".  If they had been full price I probably would not have chosen them because of this.  Too "loud" for my preferences.  However, given the clearance price I'll make do!  :)

reviews.title: ... been a fan of Asics and this did not disappoint!

title: Brooks Womens Ghost 11 Running Shoe
description: The balanced cushioning helps to offer a smooth ride to the neutral runners looking for a versatile performance. With the new soft interior and a refined mesh upper, practically vanishes on the foot mainly thanks to the strategic position of stretch and Structure. Crash Pad segmented along the entire length of the foot that sustains the foot every time it touches the ground and offers soft transitions and the BioMoGo DNA and DNA Loft cushioning even more assure every step of the foot.
features: mesh lining
Lace-Up closure
Machine Wash
SHOE SIZE: "B" = Medium width, "D" = Wide width
FOOT SUPPORT: Ideal for runners with a medium to high arch looking for neutral support.
BALANCED, SOFT CUSHIONING: BioMoGo DNA and DNA LOFT cushioning work together to provide a just-right softness underfoot without losing responsiveness and durability—yet it feels lighter than ever.
SMOOTH, STABLE RIDE: The Segmented Crash Pad is designed to adapt to each foot fall, so no matter how your foot lands, you’ll enjoy the smoothest ride possible.
SOFT, SECURE FIT: The newly engineered mesh upper practically disappears on foot with strategically placed stretch and structure where you need it most.

reviews.title: Perfect pair of Running shoes
reviews.text: I’ve been wearing Brooks running shoes for about 4 years now and they do not disappoint. At first I thought the Ghost 11 would take some time to break in unlike my other Brooks running shoes. This was not the case as by day 2 they felt very comfortable. I will continue to wear Brooks running shoes. I am a fan. I’ve even convinced my husband to switch from New Balance to Brooks and he did.

title: Saucony Men's Redeemer ISO Road Running Shoe
description:
High stability road running shoe, accomidates orthotics & overpronation
Saucony is among the most respected names in running shoes. We offer a wide range of running and walking shoes, each with the Saucony trademark fit, feel and performance. We've spent years studying the biomechanics of top athletes. Our goal? To develop creatively engineered systems that maximize your performance in your specific activity, allowing you to focus on the activity instead of the equipment. From our studies have come many innovative Saucony concepts. Advanced technologies-like Grid, the first sole-based stability and cushioning system--provide an advantage to athletes of all types.

description: The New Balance 068 was crafted for style and performance to become the new go-to shoe for runners and those with busy lifestyles. The modern design adds a touch of style while the DynaSoft midsole brings plush comfort and an ultra-responsive ride. Also featuring a full Ground Contact outsole and durable textile upper, these men's running shoes provide a comfortable fit and feel that's ideal for road running and beyond.

reviews.title: New Balance Wide Widths are the best!
reviews.text: They are the only ones I wear and these were cheaper than anywhere else. Bam!

reviews.title: These run a size too small (Mens)
reviews.text: Received my new running shoes about 15 minutes ago from Amazon.  I was excited to use these shoes on a run and tried them on.  I have a narrow foot and wear an 11 in New Balance (based on 3 pairs of shoes), and every other brand except Salomon and Saucony that run small.  Well, these run small, really small.  My toe was touching the end of the shoe, and these were very tight and hard to get on (I have a narrow foot!).  These are lightweight, look good, and appear to be somewhat well made.  The soles look like they are cheaper foam, and don't really have a running shoe tread.  Not sure how long they would last, but at the under forty dollar price when marked down, not a bad deal.  I would expect to get at least 200 miles on pavement running out of these.

reviews.title: Great shoe
reviews.text: Fit perfectly , super comfortable

reviews.title: Great running shoes
reviews.text: Excellent running shoes. The fit is more on the tight side, but it definitely fits. I give it 4/5 stars because it's not quite as comfortable as the Adidas Duramo line which also has adiprene. However I have yet to run a lot in these so it may be better than Duramo in the long term, or for more intense running. Duramo's have extra padding that, while very comfortable, feels like it could eventually start to chafe. These have a more snug fit with no such padding, but are still very comfortable.

reviews.title: My First Pair of Slip On Sneakers
reviews.text:
I own more pairs of shoes right now that at any time in my life. Part of the reason is because I am involved in more activities than I was in the past and I am thus in need of more types of shoes. My desire to diversify further led me to get my feet inside a pair of INZCOU Men's Non-Slip Gym Sneakers.

I’ve owned lots of pairs of sneakers, but this is the first time I have owned sneakers that do not have a tongue. Instead, these shoes are slip- on and that makes them a little easier to put on because you don’t have to reach down and pull the tongue out, like you commonly do with other shoes. Once they are slipped into place, you tie and are ready to go.

These shoes fit about as expected. The only small issue I had was with the arch support in one of the shoes- it seemed a little off and it hurt at first. But after walking around for a while, everything is fine now. And since these are the first pair of black sneakers I have ever owned, they match up nicely with my darker jeans. It’s a welcome change from the white sneakers I usually wear.

It’s good to have a variety of shoes and INZCOU sneakers have proven a good addition to my collection. I will still wear traditional sneakers, the type that doesn’t slip on. But I am happy to add this set of sneakers to my growing supply.

reviews.title: Lightweight and comfortable
reviews.text: Lightweight and comfortable, good for light gym use. Not super durable so I wouldn't take these out train running or anything heavy duty. But for the price they are a good shoe.

title: ASICS Men's Dynablast Running Shoes
description: The DYNABLAST shoe is recommended for runners who want a responsive underfoot experience during their run. This running shoe comfortably wraps around the foot like a gentle hug. This design features a lightweight and breathable upper to keep feet cool without forgoing support. Additionally, the shoe's upper is made with recycled materials, while the sockliner is produced with a solution dyeing process that reduces carbon emissions and water usage. Equipped with FLYTEFOAM Blast cushioning in the midsole to generate soft landings, this material is also complemented with underfoot cutouts in the outsole to provide runners with a more responsive toe-off.
features: Synthetic-and-mesh
Rubber sole
FLYTEFOAM BLAST: Lightweight, midsole foam with energetic and highly responsive cushioning and bounce for an efficient ride.
Knit upper:
Solid Rubber Outsole: Provides enhanced durability and traction.
Underfoot cutouts provide excellent bounce:
EVA Sockliner: Removable sockliner that provides cushioning performance.

reviews.title: Very lightweight and comfortable
reviews.text: Like color and comfort

reviews.title: Dyna and Nova both a Blast.
reviews.text: I had put 700 miles on my Novablast this year and wanted to tell you they held up great even through many runs in snow and rain. I found the Nova well cushioned,nice tongue, wide toe box, firm mid,, but  unstable on camber and turns and a touch heavy.. The dyna I recently purchased feel lighter, good heel cushion, thinner tongue and nice toe drop. I really like both models of ASIC.  Perfect for me at 36 miles a week.

reviews.title: Love the color
reviews.text: While too soft for me to use as a running shoe I do love the snazzy color and I get a lot of compliments on the looks.

title: New Balance Kids' 680 V6 Hook and Loop Running Shoe
description: The New Balance 680 v6 kids' running shoe is a sneaker that blends style and performance to satisfy both kids and adults alike. A modern design ups your little one's cool factor, featuring a no-sew construction for a sleek fit and feel that's snug and secure without being too tight, delivering both a comfortable fit and contemporary style. The streamlined silhouette on these running shoes for kids includes leather and mesh upper material with a stitched-down tip and foxing details for flexible support and lasting durability. These kids' performance shoes also include an ABZORB midsole that absorbs impact through a combination of cushioning and compression resistance, for a cushioned ride that takes kiddos from the classroom to the playground and everywhere in between. These comfortable kids' running shoes are available in a variety of colors that range from neutral to bold and bright, so your child can pick the one that suits their style and boosts their confidence.
features: Rubber sole
Power in Simplicity: The New Balance 680v6 running shoe for kids features a minimal leather and open mesh upper, offering flexible support and easy-breezy comfort
Modern Construction for an Outstanding Fit: The leather/mesh upper on these New Balance kids' running shoes features a stitched-down tip and foxing details to provide flexible support and durability
Soft Underfoot Cushioning: The ABZORB midsole absorbs impact through a combination of cushioning and compression resistance, giving these kids' running shoes a comfortable feel that lasts all day
Designed for Support and Durability: These kids' performance shoes feature a strong rubber outsole to offer long-lasting durability, built to stand up to daily use and playground wear-and-tear
Available in a Range of Colors: From neutral tones to bold hues, these cushioned running shoes for kids are available in a range of shades to suit the style and color preferences of your little one

reviews.title: Great for wide feet!
reviews.text: My son has bilateral clubbed feet, and he no longer wears braces but has a wide foot. New balance is the only brand that works for him. This particular model is perfect for him!

reviews.title: The best for extra wide feet
reviews.text: These shoes are perfect for my special needs child. He has extra wide feet and he has trouble with shoe tying.

reviews.title: Reviews are right about the quality
reviews.text: Wish I read the reviews more carefully. I’m so desperate to find shoes that fits my boys’ wide feet that I just assumed NB would be good because I’ve gotten them in the past. But no the quality is sub par. They are already falling apart and it’s only been 1.5 months. I’ll probably have to buy them new shoes soon which is a shame because it’s not like these are some off brand cheapies. You expect more from a company like NB.

reviews.title: 5 stars
reviews.text: These New Balance shoes are great. The insoles are so comfortable and I know that my little one is getting the protection that she needs for her growing feet. The shoes fit true to size, and they width is great. She has a normal foot, I wouldn't recommend them for a child with wide feet. They are comfortable to wear and look great. This particular style is great for young children due to the velcro. Most kids by the time they get to this style shoe CAN tie their own shoes, but its so much easier and quicker for them just to  be able to do the velcro and go!We love them.

reviews.title: Maybe I just got a defective pair of shoes...
reviews.text: The insoles don’t fit the shoes, nor were they glued in. So they kept sliding out. Nice looking shoe from a distance but they are falling apart.

reviews.title: Significantly smaller fit than GR2
reviews.text: I don't understand how the fit can be so different between generations, but it's just too small.  The outside dimensions look the same, but what looks like happened is the new foam is encroaching on the upper and there's just not enough room for your foot in there.  Returned.  Sad, because I liked the Glideride 2 and expected a better shoe, and a similar fitting shoe.

features: Improve Running Speed and Safety: Running or sports enthusiast, you must not miss this Track Spikes! This pyramid spikes will add the friction between the shoe sole and ground, thus can resist skid and improve your running speed.

Quality Spikes for Track Shoes : Made of quality stainless steel, which is very sturdy, rust-resist and anti-corrode. Pyramid needle design, not damage track. Providing long servicing life.These spikes are suitable for all athletic tracks, and field or cross country surfaces,help you get better grades.

UPDATE: The soles have separated from the shoe. We are very disappointed. I will not order again.

reviews.title: Smaller than expected but good quality…
reviews.text: These sneakers have amazing cushion and the fabric is breathable. The grips on the sole are not sa deep as I would like but they will do.  I like the lace look without actually having to tie them for little ones who can’t do so yet. They are not waterproof so if you were them in the rain or puddle your socks will get wet. Overall good everyday sneakers.
